centrcanon 0.1.0
  • Reference
    • The CEnTR*MAP Analytical Pipeline

Calculate network centrality metrics

Source: R/network.R
calculate_network_metrics.Rd

Computes a suite of node-level centrality measures for an undirected graph. All metrics are computed using igraph and base R; no optional packages are required.

Usage

calculate_network_metrics(graph)

Arguments

graph

An undirected igraph object, as produced by create_network().

Value

A tibble with one row per node and columns:

name

character. Node name.

degree

double. Normalized degree centrality.

betweenness

double. Normalized betweenness centrality.

crossclique

double. Cross-clique centrality.

cflow

double. Current-flow closeness centrality.

cbet

double. Communicability betweenness centrality (normalized).

eigen

double. Eigenvector centrality.

katz

double. Katz centrality.

community

factor. Optimal-modularity community membership.

Examples

if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{
el <- tibble::tibble(
  from = c("a", "b", "a"),
  to   = c("b", "c", "c")
)
g  <- create_network(el)
calculate_network_metrics(g)
} # }
